name: hb_1_2
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-08 compute and store: total_nox_jingye, mean_nox_jingye (Jingye Metallurgical Technology), total_nox_yanshan, mean_nox_yanshan (Hebei Yanshan Steel Group) (float), higher_nox_company_id (the company_id of the higher-NOx company, int).

turns.query: Analyze NOx emissions between Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd. and Hebei Yanshan Steel Group Co., Ltd. on 2025-06-08.
